dict.string: Bear is a notes and writing app for macOS, iOS, and Apple Watch. It offers simple but flexible writing tools, strong Markdown support, and a robust tagging system for organization.
Bear recently crashed. May we have permission to send an anonymous crash log to AppCenter so we can investigate the problem? No personal data will be shared.
We will not be able to investigate the circumstances of this crash or potentially fix the problem.
Bear needs permission to check this link in order to mobilize and save it as a note. Bear does not share any personal information in this process.
Bear will not be able to save the content of this link’s website to a note.

Bear wants to check the URL in your clipboard in order to add and link the page’s title to a note. Bear does not share any personal information in this process. To disable this feature, toggle the “title autofill” option in Bear’s preferences.
Bear will not be able to check the page for a link title before the URL is pasted inside a note. You can disable this feature, by toggling the “Auto fill title” option in Bear’s preferences.
